pi_items.source: Magento 2 backorders source model: 0=No, 1=Allow Qty Below 0, 2=Allow Qty Below 0 and Notify Customer. Verified in verifier.py line 50-60 which expects value 2.
Task description specifies 'Only X left Threshold' should be set to 5. Verified in verifier.py line 62-73 which normalizes float values and checks against 5.0
Magento Yes/No configuration model uses 0=No, 1=Yes. Verified in verifier.py line 75-81 which expects value '1'
Magento Yes/No configuration model uses 0=No, 1=Yes. Verified in verifier.py line 83-89 which expects value '1'
From install_magento.sh line 163: composer create-project --repository-url=https://repo.magento.com/ magento/project-community-edition=2.4.7
From install_magento.sh line 16: Docker containers for MariaDB + Elasticsearch; task_utils.sh line 13 queries via 'docker exec magento-mariadb mysql'
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh both query 'SELECT value FROM core_config_data WHERE path=...'

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Magento 2.4.7 Open Source e-commerce platform with inventory scarcity settings. All configuration paths are verified against Adobe Commerce official documentation: cataloginventory/item_options/backorders, cataloginventory/options/stock_threshold_qty, cataloginventory/options/show_out_of_stock, and catalog/productalert/allow_stock. Expected configuration values are: backorders=2 (Allow Qty Below 0 and Notify Customer), threshold=5 (numeric quantity threshold), show_out_of_stock=1 (Yes), allow_alert=1 (Yes). Data is stored in Magento's core_config_data database table in MariaDB. The verifier checks these four settings for a minimum score of 75 points (30+25+20+25 point breakdown). Data is synthetic (default Magento test database), not production data.
